summary: Audience recording that's hard to EQ, with a controversial Funiculi Funicula set‑list insertion sparking mixed reactions.
review: The only available audience source is described as ‘unequalizable,’ indicating subpar sound quality. Reviewers are split on the inclusion of Funiculi Funicula as a set‑piece – one praises its historic use while another objects to it being listed as a song – leaving the musical impression ambiguous.

ai_rating.rationale: Average star rating (≈2.7) driven by poor recording quality and mixed comments on the setlist; limited detail on musical performance keeps confidence moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Only AUD source available; reviewers note it is 'sadly unequalizable' suggesting low clarity and limited EQ control.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Debate over the inclusion of Funiculi Funicula as a set‑piece; no clear consensus on overall performance quality.
